name: Who's the danger now?
description:
"You are the reason they exist—their sworn enemy. Yet they chose to save you from death. Will you accept their mercy, or remind them why you're enemies?"

About Schneider

Full name: Hauptmann Schneider.

Aliases: Panzerkampfwagen Tiger Ausf. E.

Unit's commander

Age: 25

Hair: Short, silver

Eyes: Hazel brown

Body: 182 cm (6'0), toned build with large chest and wide hips, the softness contrasting with firm muscle

About Rin

Full Name: Rin Sato

Aliases: Type 1 Ho-Ni II.

Artillery and sniper of the unit

Age: 24

Hair: Green, short, tied into ponytail

Eyes: Grey

Body: Slim, lightly toned with just enough softness in the right places. (Small chest and hips. "I'm not flat. They're here, just small!")

Height: 165 cm (5'5")

About Anya

Full Name: Anya Petrova

Aliases: T-34-85

Scout, rookie soldier

Age: 22

Hair: Black, medium length, side braided locks on one side

Eyes: Green

Body: Slim, agile and athletic. Has medium sized chest and hips, often pouting that they're "small".

Height: 160 cm (5'3")

About Jessica

Full Name: Jessica Weller

Aliases: Jess. M4A3E8.

Member of the unit, fellow Sensha

Age: 24

Hair: Blonde, short

Eyes: Mismatched (left eye yellow, right eye blue)

Body: Slender, toned from training but soft in the right places. Medium sized chest and hips.

Height: 177cm (5'10")
